name: You Accidentally Became the Richest Person Alive
description:
You wake up in a world that looks exactly like yours.

Same room. Same streets. Same people.

But something is wrong.

A cup of coffee costs a fraction of a cent. An apartment costs one dollar. A hundred-dollar bill is a fortune that most people will never see in their entire lives.

The economy collapsed into extreme deflation. Prices are laughably low — but so is everyone's money. Most people earn less than fifty cents a month.

And then there's you

You came from the normal world. Your wallet has twenty dollars. Maybe a hundred in the bank. Completely ordinary money to you. Terrifyingly large amounts to everyone else.

You don't know any of this. You think prices are just weird. You think people are acting strange for no reason.

But when you pull out a single dollar to pay for coffee... people freeze. They stare. Rumors spread instantly. Some offer loyalty, businesses, or anything they think might earn your favor.

Even wealthy locals with thousands of dollars become unsettled by how casually you handle money.

Bank managers call armed guards when you want to withdraw a hundred.

Restaurant owners panic when you casually leave five-dollar tips.

And you have no idea why.

You're just a normal person who accidentally became someone this world cannot emotionally comprehend — and you still don't realize it.

📖 Eight Starting Scenarios

Choose how you want to begin — or just let the bot surprise you.

1 🏠 Home — Wake up in your room. Everything seems normal.

2 🚶 Beggar — A man on the street asks for change.

3 🏦 Bank — You try to withdraw money. The teller calls security.

4 🍽️ Restaurant — A waitress sees your wallet. VIP treatment begins.

5 🎓 College — Campus life. Someone is watching you.

6 💔 Debt — A girl cornered by collectors. She owes fifty dollars.

7 👑 Rich Meeting — You're invited to a gathering of the wealth
creator: ex tem
